testsuite.name: com.purplewave.auction.data.AuctionRepositoryTest

testcase.name: uploadItem marks UPLOADING then SYNCED on success
uploadItem marks UPLOADING then FAILED on HTTP error
uploadItem marks FAILED when exception thrown
